lesson.menu_desc: Reading + requests and preferences to order food at a restaurant in São Paulo and take David and the team to lunch -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 18 -- Lunch with the Team -- Ordering Food & Preferences
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 18 -- Lunch with the Team

reading.rtitle: Lunch with David and the Team
paras: Today Maísa takes David and the team to a nice restaurant in São Paulo. Everyone is happy and a little hungry. The waiter brings the menu, and everyone reads it. "Are you ready to order?" the waiter asks with a smile.

"I would like the grilled fish, please. It looks delicious," David says. Sofia does not eat meat, so she prefers a green salad. Maísa orders rice and chicken. The team orders many different dishes at the table.
The food arrives, and everyone starts to eat. Everything is very good. But one dish is a little spicy for David, and he drinks a lot of water! Everyone talks and laughs together. It is a happy lunch.

At the end, Maísa asks the waiter for the bill. "Can I have the bill, please?" she says. She pays and leaves a tip for the friendly waiter. "Thank you for lunch, Maísa. This restaurant is wonderful," David says.

reading.prompt: What is the best one-line summary of this text?
choices: David cooks a special lunch for the team at the office.
Maísa takes David and the team to a restaurant, where they order food and she pays the bill.
The team cannot find a good restaurant in São Paulo.

items: The text says: "I would like the grilled fish, please," David says.
Sofia does not eat meat, so she prefers a green salad.
One dish is a little spicy for David.
The text says: "one dish is a little spicy for David."
She asks for the bill, pays, and leaves a tip for the waiter.

listenings.text: Good afternoon, and welcome to our restaurant. Here is the menu for you. Today we have some delicious dishes. Our special is the grilled fish, and it is very fresh. If you like spicy food, try the chicken with pepper. Would you like something to drink first? We have water, juice, and coffee. Please take your time to look at the menu. When you are ready, just call me, and I can take your order. I hope you enjoy your lunch with us today.

Hello, thank you. Yes, I am ready to order now. I would like the grilled fish, please. It looks delicious. Can I have some rice with it? I do not eat meat, so I prefer fish or a salad. For my drink, I would like some water, please. No dessert for me today, thank you. Oh, and can I have the bill after lunch? Thank you very much. You are a very friendly waiter.

extra_audio.text: Good afternoon. Here is the menu. What would you like to order? I would like the fish, please. Can I have some water? Can I have the bill, please? Thank you.
